headline: TKO Media Deals And Buybacks Reshape UFC And WWE Earnings Mix
summary: TKO Group Holdings (NYSE:TKO) has agreed multi billion dollar media rights deals for UFC and WWE, including a US$7.7b package with Paramount Global for UFC on Paramount+. The company has also signed a new distribution partnership with ESPN for WWE events, shifting more content into long term, contract based arrangements. TKO announced a US$1b share repurchase program alongside plans to launch Zuffa Boxing and manage hospitality for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. TKO, which controls UFC and WWE,...
